changelog.message: integrated SSE support directly into the operator for stability
changelog.author: Antigravity

summary: HTTP File Server for standalone cables gl. Supports File serving, Health check, and Integrated SSE broadcasts.

ports.name: Hostname
ports.text: Interface to listen on (default 127.0.0.1 for local only)

ports.name: Port
ports.text: Port to listen on

ports.name: Root Directory
ports.text: Root directory to serve files from. Defaults to patch directory.

ports.name: Auto Start
ports.text: If enabled, the server starts automatically after a short delay.

ports.name: Start Server
ports.text: Manually start the server.

ports.name: Stop Server
ports.text: Manually stop the server.

ports.name: SSE Event Name
ports.text: The name of the SSE event to broadcast (default: message).

ports.name: SSE Data
ports.text: The JSON data payload to broadcast.

ports.name: Broadcast SSE
ports.text: Trigger to send the event to all connected SSE clients.

ports.name: Server Started
ports.text: Fires when the server has successfully started.

ports.name: Server Stopped
ports.text: Fires when the server has stopped.

ports.name: Server Ready
ports.text: Fires when the server is ready to accept connections.

ports.name: On HTTP Request
ports.text: Fires on every incoming HTTP request.

ports.name: HTTP URL
ports.text: The URL of the incoming request.

ports.name: HTTP Request Data
ports.text: The Node.js incoming request object.

ports.name: HTTP Response Data
ports.text: The Node.js server response object.

ports.name: Error
ports.text: Contains any error message if the server fails to start or run.

ports.name: Running
ports.text: True if the server is currently running.

ports.name: Server Instance
ports.text: The Node.js HTTP server instance.

ports.name: Active Clients
ports.text: The number of currently connected SSE clients.
